axis_responsibility.Agent: Owns performer identity and closed returned fact, but S1 parked produces no AgentFact and no fabricated returned payload.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Owns the declared work contract and Building Plan step that names adapter:chat-session.
axis_responsibility.Evidence: Envelope, park record, frontier projection, reporter event, checker fixtures, and profile outputs are support evidence only, not source truth or judgment.
axis_responsibility.Link: Owns Movement/gate sufficiency elsewhere; S1 parked must not choose Movement, route target, or add Link vocabulary.
axis_responsibility.Support: May resolve adapter kind, record envelope and park evidence, stop the walk fails-closed, derive frontier observation, and project reporter bell evidence.

candidate_file_changes: support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py or a sibling parked-frontier recording module if local pattern supports it
relevant support/checkers profile YAML and FIRE fixtures for parked S1
checker_or_verifier_plan: Checker-first: add or extend profile fixtures before implementation for the S1 parked invariants.
Envelope FIRE: mutated envelope with extra key, UUID/ULID token, free-text session id, or credential-like field must fail.
Distinct-shape FIRE: mutated park record that matches adapter-error shape must fail.
Observer-order FIRE: mutated observation order that reports parked as incomplete/running must fail.
Reporter FIRE: removal of parked frontier event mapping must fail.
Path FIRE: omission from either check_package_path_admission.py or check_building_lifecycle_path_shape.py allowlist must fail.
Green command required after implementation: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all.
returned.design_summary: S1 should be designed as a pre-step support parking seam: adapter resolution identifies adapter:chat-session, produces a typed parked signal without AgentFact or CLI invocation, runner records the closed AgentAdapterRequest projection plus a distinct park record, then stops the walk through existing fails-closed frontier mechanics. Parked is a support/evidence condition and derived frontier observation, not Link Movement, Agent return, success, failure, or quality judgment.
edge_cases: Unknown adapter kind should remain loud reject, not fallback to local.
A chat-session step with malformed request projection should not write partial ambiguous evidence.
Existing adapter-error records must continue to project as breakdown/error, not parked.
A parked building with envelope missing but park record present should be treated as malformed park state.
A removed reporter mapping should fire the reporter checker pin.
A path admitted in only one path checker should still fail the full path admission proof.
invariants: Parked outcome is typed and cannot silently fall through to local adapter execution or agent_incomplete.
Envelope shape equals AgentAdapterRequest projection shape; no invented fields.
No UUID/ULID-shaped token, free-text session id, credential, auth body, or provider session text enters envelope or park record.
Park record is distinguishable from adapter-error by kind/shape.
Malformed park state or missing envelope is a loud reject.
Parked frontier branch is evaluated before agent_incomplete.
Reporter event mapping for parked is closed and pinned.
Both path admission checkers admit the new envelope/park paths explicitly.
not_proven: No repository files were inspected in this return because the instruction packet forbids tools.
Exact current function names, fixture locations, and profile count are not verified here.
Whether existing typed adapter-error exception APIs can be reused directly is not verified here.
Whether all 12 checker profiles are currently green is not proven here.
S1 implementation, FIRE demonstrations, and check_profile.py --all execution remain not proven.
observed_evidence: Task source declares S1 only: chat-session adapter step parks before work execution, records support-only work envelope and park record, then stops fails-closed.
Task source explicitly excludes S2 submit and S3 resume, and forbids scheduler, queue, retry, timer, polling, Link vocabulary changes, and link/ edits.
Task source requires frontier observation and reporter wake projection for parked buildings, plus checker pins that fire red on mutated copies and pass under check_profile.py --all.

proposed_changes: Add provider-neutral adapter:chat-session handling that never invokes a CLI and raises or returns a typed parked outcome carrying only the already-formed AgentAdapterRequest projection reference/data needed for recording.

Add closed-shape work envelope recording from serialized AgentAdapterRequest projection only, with no invented fields, no provider session id, no UUID/ULID token, no credential/auth body, and no status/verdict keys.

Add a distinct park record modeled structurally near adapter_error_frontier but not shape-indistinguishable from adapter-error; use an explicit parked record kind and fields that describe waiting/park evidence only.
In run.py, catch the parked outcome at the pre-step adapter boundary, write envelope and park record append-only, and stop the lane/building loudly without creating AgentFact or fallback return data.
Add ledger/frontier observation branch for parked before agent_incomplete so recorded parked evidence projects as parked/intervention-needed rather than incomplete/running.
Update reporter closed maps and event kind sets so parked frontier produces a delivery/wake observable event without creating any scheduler, external delivery, or Movement choice.

Add FIRE fixtures/mutated-copy tests for envelope closed keys and forbidden session tokens, park-vs-adapter-error distinction, observer branch order, reporter mapping removal, and both path allowlists.
relevant_current_structure: Adapter connection surface: support/connection/agent_adapter.py should own adapter kind recognition and typed parked signal shape.
Runner integration surface: support/operator/run.py should catch the typed parked signal before AgentFact creation and write support records.
Recording precedent: support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py is a shape precedent only; parked needs a distinct record kind and distinguishable fields.
Observation surfaces: support/recording/contracts.py, support/operator/ledger_projection.py, and frontier observation logic need parked ordered before agent_incomplete.
Reporter projection: support/operator/reporter.py closed maps and event frozensets need a parked frontier mapping into the needs_disposition/intervention_required family.
Checker surfaces: support/checkers/check_package_path_admission.py, support/checkers/check_building_lifecycle_path_shape.py, and profile fixtures need explicit path and behavior pins.
returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: Do not edit link/ or add Link Movement/state/transition vocabulary.
Do not add scheduler, queue, retry, timer, polling, webhook, Slack, thread wake delivery, or provider runtime behavior.
Do not create AgentFact, success/failure result, quality verdict, GateFact, route target, or Movement decision from the parked seam.
Do not rewrite existing evidence or fixture facts; new evidence should be append-only.
Do not weaken or bypass existing checker pins or profile coverage.
